sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29580" key="dusfeggh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-φεγγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n29580.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shining ill, gloomy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
